description.value:
Starting at 6th level, you realize that your element is far more capable than what you initially thought.

Through your element, you are able to harness the energies of a reality beyond your understanding, allowing your equipment and inventions to enter a whole new league of power.

First, you gain access to a new SNT known as the Aether Connector.

This device weighs 0 bulk, and is roughly 2 feet in diameter and 4 feet deep.

This device allows you to store up to 100 bulk in contents in an alternate dimension, so long as the total volume does not exceed 64 cubic feet.

If the Aether Connector is ever destroyed, its contents immediately spill out, and you may craft a new one on a full rest by spending 1 use of an Alchemist Kit.

Secondly, equipment that presides within your Aether Connector does not stagnate.

Instead, it is imbued the essence of the foreign dimension your device accesses, gaining a special benefit after presiding in the space for at least 1 hour depending on the item, detailed on the Aether Table.

Items lose these benefits if they remain out of the Aether Conductor for 8 hours.
